u: Daney (grain) aur guthli ko phadne (sprout) wala Allah hai, wahi zinda ko murda se nikalta hai aur wahi murde ko zinda se kharij karta hai, yeh sarey kaam karne wala to Allah hai, phir tum kidhar behke chale jaa rahey ho

ar: فَالِقُ ٱلۡإِصۡبَاحِ وَجَعَلَ ٱلَّيۡلَ سَكَنࣰ ا وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَ حُسۡبَانࣰ اۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيرُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡعَلِيمِ
t: Faliqu alisbahi wajaAAala allayla sakanan waalshshamsa waalqamara husbanan thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi
u: Purda e shab (night) ko chaak karke wahi subah nikalta hai, usi ne raat ko sukoon ka waqt banaya hai usi ne Chand aur Suraj ke tulu-o-guroob ka hisaab muqarrar kiya hai. Yeh sab usi zabardast qudrat aur ilm rakhne waley ke thehraye huey andaze hain

ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلنُّجُومَ لِتَهۡتَدُواْ بِهَا فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِۗ قَدۡ فَصَّلۡنَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمࣲ يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Wahuwa allathee jaAAala lakumu alnnujooma litahtadoo biha fee thulumati albarri waalbahri qad fassalna alayati liqawmin yaAAlamoona
u: Aur wahi hai jisne tumhare liye taaron ko sehra aur samandar ki tareekiyon mein raasta maloom karne ka zariya banaya. Dekho humne nishaniyan khol kar bayan kardi hain un logon ke liye jo ilm rakhte hain

ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَكُم مِّن نَّفۡسࣲ وَٰحِدَةࣲ فَمُسۡتَقَرࣱّ وَمُسۡتَوۡدَعࣱۗ قَدۡ فَصَّلۡنَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمࣲ يَفۡقَهُونَ
t: Wahuwa allathee anshaakum min nafsin wahidatin famustaqarrun wamustawdaAAun qad fassalna alayati liqawmin yafqahoona
u: Aur wahi hai jisne ek mutanaffis se tumko paida kiya phir har ek ke liye ek jaaye qaraar(time-limit) hai aur ek uske sompey janey ki jagah(resting place). Yeh nishaniyan humne wazeh kardi hain un logon ke liye jo samajh boojh rakhte hain

ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءࣰ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ نَبَاتَ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مِنۡهُ خَضِرࣰ ا نُّخۡرِجُ مِنۡهُ حَبࣰّ ا مُّتَرَاكِبࣰ ا وَمِنَ ٱلنَّخۡلِ مِن طَلۡعِهَا قِنۡوَانࣱ دَانِيَةࣱ وَجَنَّٰتࣲ مِّنۡ أَعۡنَابࣲ وَٱلزَّيۡتُونَ وَٱلرُّمَّانَ مُشۡتَبِهࣰ ا وَغَيۡرَ مُتَشَٰبِهٍۗ ٱنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ثَمَرِهِۦٓ إِذَآ أَثۡمَرَ وَيَنۡعِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكُمۡ لَأٓيَٰتࣲ لِّقَوۡمࣲ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
t: Wahuwa allathee anzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi nabata kulli shayin faakhrajna minhu khadiran nukhriju minhu habban mutarakiban wamina alnnakhli min talAAiha qinwanun daniyatun wajannatin min aAAnabin waalzzaytoona waalrrummana mushtabihan waghayra mutashabihin onthuroo ila thamarihi itha athmara wayanAAihi inna fee thalikum laayatin liqawmin yuminoona
u: Aur wahi hai jisne aasman se pani barsaya, phir uske zariye se har qisam ki nabataat ugayi, phir ussey harey harey khet aur darakht paida kiye, phir unse tai ba tai chadey huey daaney(grains) nikale aur khajoor ke shagufon se phalon (fruits) ke gucchey ke gucchey paida kiye jo bojh ke maarey jhuke padte hain, aur angoor, zaitoon aur anaar ke baagh lagaye jinke phal ek dusre se milte julte bhi hain aur phir har ek ki khususiyat juda juda bhi hai. Yeh darakht jab phalte hain to inmein phal aane aur phir unke pakne ki kaifiyat zara gaur ki nazar se dekho, in cheezon mein nishaniyan hain un logon ke liye jo iman latey hain

ar: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ شُرَكَآءَ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَخَلَقَهُمۡۖ وَخَرَقُواْ لَهُۥ بَنِينَ وَبَنَٰتِۭ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمࣲۚ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
t: WajaAAaloo lillahi shurakaa aljinna wakhalaqahum wakharaqoo lahu baneena wabanatin bighayri AAilmin subhanahu wataAAala AAamma yasifoona
u: Ispar bhi logon ne Jinno ko Allah ka shareek thehra diya, halaanke woh unka khaliq hai,aur bay-janey boojhey uske liye bete aur betiyan tasneef kardi, halaanke woh paak aur baala –tar hai un baaton se jo yeh log kehte hain

ar: بَدِيعُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لَهُۥ وَلَدࣱ وَلَمۡ تَكُن لَّهُۥ صَٰحِبَةࣱۖ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيۡءࣲۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمࣱ‏
t: BadeeAAu alssamawati waalardi anna yakoonu lahu waladun walam takun lahu sahibatun wakhalaqa kulla shayin wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleemun
u: Woh to aasmano aur zameen ka mujid (originator) hai. Uska koi beta kaise ho sakta hai jabke koi uski shareek e zindagi hi nahin hai. Usne har cheez ko paida kiya hai aur woh har cheez ka ilm rakhta hai

ar: ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ خَٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ فَٱعۡبُدُوهُۚ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ وَكِيلࣱ‏
t: Thalikumu Allahu rabbukum la ilaha illa huwa khaliqu kulli shayin faoAAbudoohu wahuwa AAala kulli shayin wakeelun
u: Yeh hai Allah tumhara Rubb, koi khuda uske siwa nahin hai, har cheez ka khaliq, lihaza tum usi ki bandagi karo aur woh har cheez ka kafeel hai

ar: لَّا تُدۡرِكُهُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ وَهُوَ يُدۡرِكُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرَۖ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلۡخَبِيرُ
t: La tudrikuhu alabsaru wahuwa yudriku alabsara wahuwa allateefu alkhabeeru
u: Nigahein usko nahin paa sakti aur woh nigaahon ko paa leta hai, woh nihayat bareek been aur ba-khabar hai

ar: قَدۡ جَآءَكُم بَصَآئِرُ مِن رَّبِّكُمۡۖ فَمَنۡ أَبۡصَرَ فَلِنَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ عَمِيَ فَعَلَيۡهَاۚ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ عَلَيۡكُم بِحَفِيظࣲ‏
t: Qad jaakum basairu min rabbikum faman absara falinafsihi waman AAamiya faAAalayha wama ana AAalaykum bihafeethin
u: Dekho, tumhare paas tumhare Rubb ki taraf se baseerat ki roshniyan aa gayi hain, ab jo beenayi se kaam lega apna hi bhala karega aur jo andha banega khud nuqsan uthayega, main tumpar koi paasbaan(keeper) nahin hoon

ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نُصَرِّفُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ وَلِيَقُولُواْ دَرَسۡتَ وَلِنُبَيِّنَهُۥ لِقَوۡمࣲ يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Wakathalika nusarrifu alayati waliyaqooloo darasta walinubayyinahu liqawmin yaAAlamoona
u: Is tarah hum apni aayat ko baar baar mukhtalif tareeqon se bayan karte hain aur is liye karte hain ke yeh log kahein tum kisi se padh aaye ho, aur jo log ilm rakhte hain unpar hum haqeeqat ko roshan kardein

ar: ٱتَّبِعۡ مَآ أُوحِيَ إِلَيۡكَ مِن رَّبِّكَۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ وَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ
t: IttabiAA ma oohiya ilayka min rabbika la ilaha illa huwa waaAArid AAani almushrikeena
u: (Aey Muhammad)! Us wahee ki pairwi kiye jao jo tumpar tumhare Rubb ki taraf se nazil hui hai, kyunke us ek Rubb ke siwa koi aur khuda nahin hai. Aur in mushrikeen ke peechey na pado

ar: وَلَوۡ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مَآ أَشۡرَكُواْۗ وَمَا جَعَلۡنَٰكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَفِيظࣰ اۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِوَكِيلࣲ‏
t: Walaw shaa Allahu ma ashrakoo wama jaAAalnaka AAalayhim hafeethan wama anta AAalayhim biwakeelin
u: Agar Allah ki mashiyat hoti to (woh khud aisa bandobast kar sakta tha ke) yeh log shirk na karte, tumko humne inpar pasbaan (guardian) muqarrar nahin kiya hai aur na tum inpar hawaladaar ho

ar: وَلَا تَسُبُّواْ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَيَسُبُّواْ ٱللَّهَ عَدۡوَۢا بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمࣲۗ كَذَٰلِكَ زَيَّنَّا لِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ عَمَلَهُمۡ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِم مَّرۡجِعُهُمۡ فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Wala tasubboo allatheena yadAAoona min dooni Allahi fayasubboo Allaha AAadwan bighayri AAilmin kathalika zayyanna likulli ommatin AAamalahum thumma ila rabbihim marjiAAuhum fayunabbiohum bima kanoo yaAAmaloona
u: Aur (Aey iman laney walon!) yeh log Allah ke siwa jinko pukarte hain unhein gaaliyan na do, kahin aisa na ho ke yeh shirk se aagey badhkar jahalat ki bina par Allah ko gaaliyan dene lagein. Humne to isi tarah har giroh ke liye uske amal ko khushnumna bana diya hai, phir unhein apne Rubb hi ki taraf palat kar aana hai, us waqt woh unhein bata dega ke woh kya karte rahey hain

ar: وَأَقۡسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ جَهۡدَ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ لَئِن جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ءَايَةࣱ لَّيُؤۡمِنُنَّ بِهَاۚ قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِۖ وَمَا يُشۡعِرُكُمۡ أَنَّهَآ إِذَا جَآءَتۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
t: Waaqsamoo biAllahi jahda aymanihim lain jaathum ayatun layuminunna biha qul innama alayatu AAinda Allahi wama yushAAirukum annaha itha jaat la yuminoona
u: Yeh log kadi kadi kasamein kha kha kar kehte hain ke agar koi nishani hamare saamne aa jaye to hum uspar iman le aayenge. Aey Muhammad! Inse kaho, ke “nishaniyan to Allah ke paas hain” aur tumhein kaise samajhaya jaye ke agar nishaniyan aa bhi jayein to yeh iman laney waley nahin

ar: وَنُقَلِّبُ أَفۡـِٔدَتَهُمۡ وَأَبۡصَٰرَهُمۡ كَمَا لَمۡ يُؤۡمِنُواْ بِهِۦٓ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةࣲ وَنَذَرُهُمۡ فِي طُغۡيَٰنِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُونَ
t: Wanuqallibu afidatahum waabsarahum kama lam yuminoo bihi awwala marratin wanatharuhum fee tughyanihim yaAAmahoona
u: Hum usi tarah inke dilon aur nigaahon ko pher rahey hain jis tarah yeh pehli martaba uspar iman nahin laye thay, hum inhein inki sarkashi hi mein bhatakne ke liye chodhe dete hain
